вӨ· He'll find your price.

вӨ· All Eli wanted was to enjoy his last year as a free college brat in peace, fucking around with no responsibilities. But he can't help himself when his twin sister comes crying for his help, blubbering about how you walked in on her making out with the professor. His sister was already the black sheep of the family, and he wasn't about to let some nobody like you ruin her life any more than she'd already done herself. Money talks, he just needed to find your price.

BRIBERY GONE WRONG (GONE SEXUAL???) вҡ№ STRANGERS TO ENEMIES TO LOVERS
